ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot checking the time, mimicking the action of looking at a clock showing eleven-thirty.  The sequence will focus on the robot's arms moving to simulate this action, with a subtle emphasis on careful, deliberate movements. The left arm will primarily be used to bring the hand to the face in a gesture of looking at a watch. The right arm will remain in a neutral position, providing contrast and balance. In the first frame, both arms start in a neutral position at the sides.  The left arm begins to move towards the face. In the second frame, the left arm is halfway to the face, with the wrist slightly rotated to simulate glancing at a watch. The right arm remains still.  In the third frame, the left arm approaches the face, with the hand near the temple, as if looking at a watch on the wrist. The right arm remains neutral.  In the fourth frame, the left arm is gently removed from the face, returning to a neutral position. The right arm remains neutral.  In the fifth frame, both arms return to their original neutral positions.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready to check
left arm begins to lift, checking the time
hand nears the face, a quick glance at the watch
left arm lowers, the time has been noted
both arms return to a resting position
